title: Assertion fault on SQL input
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(id UInt32, value String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
CREATE TABLE t2(mx_payload Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY mx_payload;
CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW trig1 TO t2 AS SELECT id AS mx_payload FROM t1;
INSERT INTO t2(mx_payload) VALUES (0), (1), (42), (0) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE mx_payload = mx_payload;
key_bug_features: IF NOT EXISTS trigger with multiple RETURNING clauses
